privileged_info_summary: No explicit metadata claims found in task.json. The export_to_pdf task uses the same floorplan.dxf file as other LibreCAD tasks. This file is a real, non-synthetic file from the jscad/sample-files GitHub repository (1,117,143 bytes / 1.1MB). It is a valid AutoCAD DXF v2004 (AC1018) file containing 967 entities (624 lines, 63 dimensions, 98 text elements across 89 TEXT + 9 MTEXT) organized in 24 named layers. The repository is licensed under MIT License. Installation scripts incorrectly claim the repository is 'Apache-licensed', but verification of the actual repository shows MIT License.
